jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Renamed the project artifact name and description to reflect the new branding and scope.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.human_impl:
<name>CamelTD :: ATM finder</name>
<description>Application to find ATM across The Netherlands</description>

jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Replaced individual Spring Framework dependencies with the Spring Boot Starter Web to simplify classpath management.
Removed explicit Log4j and SLF4J bindings, relying on Spring Boot's default logging configuration.
Removed the Lombok dependency, likely in favor of Kotlin data classes or manual boilerplate.
Added Spring Boot Test dependency to support modern Spring Boot testing features.
Added the Kotlin Standard Library dependency to support Kotlin source code compilation.
Replaced legacy Mockito and JUnit 4 dependencies with Camel Test JUnit 5 integrations.
Added Kotest assertions for Kotlin-based testing.
Added MockK as the mocking framework for Kotlin tests.
Added SpringMockK to facilitate mocking Spring beans in Kotlin tests.
Configured Maven to look for main source code in the Kotlin directory.
Added the Kotlin Maven Plugin with Spring and JPA compiler plugins to compile Kotlin code.
Updated the compiler source and target properties to use the new java.version property.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.remove_tomcat7_plugin: Removed the legacy Tomcat 7 Maven plugin.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Removed the legacy Tomcat 7 Maven plugin.
Removed the Jetty Maven plugin configuration.
Replaced the Coveralls Maven plugin with a custom Omni Coverage Reporter plugin.
Configured the Surefire plugin to explicitly include Test and IT classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Adopt Spring Boot 3.2.1 parent POM to manage dependencies and ensure compatibility with Java 21 and Spring Framework 6.
Upgrade Spring Framework to version 6.0.4, which is required for Java 21 and Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Upgrade Spring Security to version 6.2.1 to match the Spring Framework 6 ecosystem.
Upgrade Apache Camel to version 4.3.0, which supports Java 21 and integrates with Spring Boot 3.
Upgrade Jetty to version 11.0.19 to support Java 21 and modern servlet specifications.
Add Kotlin standard library dependency to support Kotlin code compilation in the project.
Add Kotest assertions library for modern Kotlin-based testing.
Add MockK library for Kotlin-native mocking in tests.
Add SpringMockK to integrate MockK with Spring Boot testing.
Remove Lombok dependency, likely replacing it with Kotlin data classes or manual boilerplate.
Upgrade Guava to version 33.0.0-jre for security patches and Java 21 compatibility.
Upgrade JUnit 4 to version 4.13.2 for bug fixes and compatibility.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.12.0 to ensure proper compilation with Java 21.
Upgrade Maven Surefire Plugin to 3.2.3 for better test execution support.
Replace coveralls-maven-plugin with omni-coveragereporter-maven-plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add a human-readable name to the parent POM for better identification in build outputs.
Explicitly define versions for resources, war, and jar plugins to ensure build reproducibility.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Switch the CI Docker image from OpenJDK 17 to Eclipse Temurin 21 to align with the target Java version.

.github/workflows/camel-test-drives.yml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 to match the target runtime.
Upgrade GitHub Actions runners and setup-java actions to v3 for better maintenance and compatibility.
Consolidate separate coverage reporting steps into a single unified step using the omni-coveragereporter plugin.
Update the Maven build command to explicitly include jacoco agent preparation and reporting goals.
.github/workflows/camel-test-drives.yml.human_impl: run: mvn clean install jacoco:prepare-agent package jacoco:report

.github/workflows/camel-test-drives.yml.general_idea: Limit the workflow trigger to only the master branch instead of all pushes.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore .attach* files generated by Java debuggers or process attachment tools to keep the repository clean.
